issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing animation data or network failures.
The skill is limited to browser or React Native environments and does not support other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: Build a React Lottie component that plays only frames 10-50 on hover
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses lottie-web's loadAnimation with renderer:'svg', anim.playSegments([10,50], true) for hover, and calls animRef.current?.destroy() in cleanup; baseline often imports lottie-react and misses playSegments and explicit destroy on unmount.

scenarios.name: Recolor a Lottie JSON to match brand colors before rendering
scenarios.rationale: Treatment walks layer.shapes/it recursively, matches shape.ty === 'fl' fills via shape.c.k, and writes back normalized [r,g,b,1] tuples as in the skill's recolorAnimation; baseline edits hex strings or applies CSS filters which do not work on Lottie shape fills.
